rationale: All three acceptance criteria pass: 24×24px minimum target size applied via min-w/min-h Tailwind classes, aria-label added to all three copy buttons, and focus-visible ring applied using the project's established pattern. Commit format and branch naming comply with git-workflow standards. Five findings were triaged to 'defer': (1) validate-secrets.mjs quoting handles the actual use case and any parentheses edge case is pre-existing; (2) className string assertions are the best available in JSDOM without computed-style infrastructure; (3–5) ChatConfigAssistantCard, WorkflowExecutionInfoPopup, and DetailsCopyField copy buttons have the same accessibility gaps but are out of this ticket's scope — should be follow-up tickets. 2 defer findings dismissed: 0 dismissed.

business_review.criterion: Interactive hit area ≥24×24 CSS px (WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8)
business_review.evidence: min-w-[24px] min-h-[24px] applied to all three copy buttons (ProfileCard + both NavigationProfile buttons) via inline-flex container

business_review.criterion: Reliable accessible name — aria-label required (title alone insufficient)
business_review.evidence: aria-label='Copy user ID' on ProfileCard; aria-label='Copy username' and aria-label='Copy user ID' on NavigationProfile; both aria-label and title coexist

business_review.criterion: Visible focus outline for keyboard operability
business_review.evidence: focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-border-accent rounded-sm applied to all three buttons — uses project's established focus ring pattern (same as PinnedRow)

business_review.criterion: Scope: Profile page (ProfileCard.tsx) primary; NavigationProfile.tsx bonus
business_review.evidence: Both files modified; all three affected buttons fixed

standards_review.standard: Commit message format: EPMCDME-XXXX: Capital sentence
standards_review.notes: All three commits comply: 'Fix secrets check…', 'Fix copy button target size and accessibility in ProfileCard', 'Fix copy button target size and accessibility in NavigationProfile'

standards_review.standard: Security: no credentials or secrets introduced
standards_review.notes: No credentials, API keys, or sensitive data added; gitleaks scan clean
